name: control_device
description: Send a control command to a smart home device. Supported devices: led_matrix (Govee RGBIC LED panel), rice_cooker, fan, oven. Each device accepts specific commands via the command object.

device_type.description: The type of device to control. One of: led_matrix, rice_cooker, fan, oven.

command.description: Command object. Must include 'action' field. LED matrix actions: setPower(power:bool), setMode(mode:rainbow|breathing|chase|sparkle|fire|ocean|aurora), setBrightness(brightness:0-100), setColor(color:#RRGGBB). Rice cooker actions: start(mode:white_rice|brown_rice|porridge|steam), stop(), keepWarm(enabled:bool). Fan actions: setPower(power:bool), setSpeed(speed:0-3), setOscillation(enabled:bool). Oven actions: setPower(power:bool), setMode(mode:bake|broil|convection), setTemperature(temperature:200-500).

action.description: The action to perform on the device

topic.description: MQTT topic the command was published to
